name: BashTool
description: Execute a shell command and return its stdout, stderr, and exit code. Use this for running tests, builds, git operations, or any CLI interaction.

name: FileReadTool
description: Read the contents of a file at a given path. Supports optional line range selection for reading specific portions of large files.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the file

end_line.description: Last line to read (1-indexed, inclusive, optional)

name: FileEditTool
description: Edit a file by replacing an exact string match (old_text) with new content (new_text). The old_text must match exactly including whitespace and indentation.

path.description: Path to the file to edit

old_text.description: Exact text to find and replace

name: FileWriteTool
description: Create a new file or overwrite an existing file with the given content. Parent directories are created automatically.

path.description: Path to the file to create or overwrite

content.description: Full content to write to the file

name: GlobTool
description: Find files matching a glob pattern. Returns a list of matching file paths. Useful for discovering project structure.

path.description: Base directory to search from (default: current directory)

name: GrepTool
description: Search for a pattern in file contents recursively. Returns matching lines with file paths and line numbers.

path.description: Directory or file to search (default: current directory)

name: ListDirectoryTool
description: List the files and subdirectories in a given directory. Returns names, types (file/dir), and sizes.

path.description: Directory path to list (default: current directory)

name: WebFetchTool
description: Fetch the content of a URL and return the response body as text. Useful for reading documentation, APIs, or web pages. Limited to 10KB response.

name: WebSearchTool
description: Search the web for information using DuckDuckGo. Returns abstracts, answers, and related topics. No API key required.

name: NotebookEditTool
description: Edit a Jupyter notebook (.ipynb) file by replacing an exact string match with new content. Works like FileEditTool but for notebook JSON files.

old_text.description: Exact text to find and replace

name: orchestrator_delegate
description: Delegate a task to a named specialist sub-agent and wait for the result. Available agents: coordinator (task decomposition), deep-worker (research and analysis), planner (structured planning), debugger (error diagnosis). Use this when a task requires specialized expertise or when you want to parallelize work.

agent_name.description: Name of the sub-agent: coordinator, deep-worker, planner, or debugger

task.description: The task description to send to the sub-agent

name: orchestrator_delegate_bg
description: Delegate a task to a named specialist sub-agent in the background. Returns immediately with a confirmation. The agent runs asynchronously. Use this for tasks that can run in parallel.

agent_name.description: Name of the sub-agent: coordinator, deep-worker, planner, or debugger

task.description: The task description to send to the sub-agent
